details.description: Interior of a museum gallery with an ornate white stucco vaulted ceiling and cornice. A very large 19th‑century academic history painting in a gilded frame dominates the wall, lit from above by track lights. The canvas depicts a chaotic medieval cavalry battle with fallen horses and soldiers in the foreground, banners and lances, and at the top center a raised platform with a standard/cross—suggestive of a carroccio—amid swirling smoke and clouds. Smaller framed works hang to the right, including a dark-toned devotional scene, and a rope barrier with a red carpet keeps visitors back from the painting. Walls are neutral light gray; the floor is terracotta with stone insets.

entities.name: Battle of Legnano (La Battaglia di Legnano)
entities.notes: Oil on canvas by Amos Cassioli (1832–1891), c. 1860s–1870s; depicts the 1176 victory of the Lombard League with the carroccio at center; housed in Palazzo Pitti's Galleria d'Arte Moderna.

details.description: An interior view of a classical Florence gallery. The room features a white, arched ceiling with decorative mouldings and a soft, focused lighting scheme. On the wall hangs a large, wide-format historical battle painting in a heavy gilded frame, depicting a chaotic mêlée of soldiers, banners, and horses under smoky skies. A red carpeted platform or walkway leads toward the canvas, protected by a rope barrier. To the right, a smaller framed work shows a figure, and a small display case sits beneath it. The walls are neutral-toned, and the overall ambiance is that of a traditional European museum or palace gallery, with other ornate frames visible along adjacent walls.

details.description: Interior of a museum gallery with a high white coffered ceiling and ornate cornices. A very large gold-framed 19th‑century academic history painting dominates the wall, showing a chaotic medieval battle with armored knights on horseback, fallen soldiers, banners, and an elevated war wagon with a cross and figures above the fray. Velvet ropes and a red runner keep visitors back. Two smaller framed paintings hang to the right.

details.description: A gallery interior in Florence features a dominant large horizontal canvas with a heavy gilded frame depicting a chaotic historical battle. The scene shows numerous soldiers in period armor and clothing clashing on a battlefield, with mounted figures and swordplay; the palette includes blues, reds, and metallic tones. In the background a hazy landscape and a raised central platform with figures add depth. To the right, smaller works are visible (a square piece and a tiny framed piece). A low rope barrier fronts the paintings; the floor features a red carpet path leading toward the wall. The ceiling is a curved arch with decorative plasterwork; the walls are light-toned, contributing to a classical gallery ambiance.

entities.name: Historical battle painting
entities.notes: Dominant large canvas in a Florence gallery; likely 17th–19th century European academic style.

details.description: An interior view of a grand museum gallery featuring a massive 19th-century oil painting in a gilded frame dominating the central wall. The artwork depicts a chaotic medieval battle scene, specifically the Battle of Legnano, featuring a 'Carroccio' (ox-drawn altar wagon) in the background with trumpeters, and a melee of soldiers and horses in the foreground, including a prominent white horse falling. To the left, the edge of another large framed painting is visible. To the right, two smaller framed paintings hang vertically; the upper one depicts a religious scene with a figure supporting a limp body (resembling a Deposition or Pietà). The room has high vaulted ceilings with white decorative molding, track lighting, and a tiled floor with a red carpet runner and rope stanchions protecting the art.

details.description: A large-scale 19th-century oil painting titled 'The Battle of Legnano' by Amos Cassioli is displayed in a grand gallery room. The painting depicts a chaotic battle scene with knights on horseback and soldiers in combat, with a raised platform in the background featuring figures and banners. The artwork is housed in a heavy gilded frame. The room features a white vaulted ceiling with decorative stucco work and recessed panels. To the right, two smaller paintings are hung vertically; the upper one appears to be a religious scene. A red carpet runner leads toward the main painting, which is protected by a brass stanchion and rope barrier. The floor is made of polished stone or terrazzo.

details.description: Interior of a museum gallery with an ornate neoclassical vaulted ceiling and moulded cornices. Dominating the room is a monumental panoramic oil painting in a heavy gilded frame depicting a ferocious medieval cavalry battle: fallen horses and armored knights, lances and standards, and at the top a raised platform with standard-bearers/clerics by a war banner. Two smaller framed paintings hang on the right wall. A rope barrier and red carpet keep visitors at a distance from the main canvas.

details.description: A museum gallery featuring a dominant large oil painting on the central wall depicting a chaotic Napoleonic-era battle: numerous soldiers and cavalry clash with raised swords and flags, many figures in vivid uniforms, smoke and action filling the scene, and a dramatic light source from the left. The painting is set in a broad, ornate gold frame. To the right hangs a secondary artwork showing a classical scene with a reclining or partially nude female figure surrounded by others, in a similarly ornate frame. A smaller dark-framed piece is mounted below it. On the far left, part of another painting is visible. The room has white plaster walls with decorative molding and a coffered, curved ceiling. The floor includes a beige surface with a red carpet pathway in front of the main painting and a rope barrier, plus a small display case nearby with an information placard. The overall lighting is warm and museum-like, emphasizing the artworks.

entities.notes: Classical/neoclassical figure study; dramatic lighting and drapery.

entities.name: Small dark-framed auxiliary artwork
entities.notes: Miniature framed piece mounted to the wall beneath the right-hand painting.

entities.name: Neoclassical museum arch and ornate plasterwork

Smaller framed paintings hang to the right. A red carpet runner and rope barrier keep visitors back from the artwork.

details.description: A very large framed canvas in a museum gallery depicting a chaotic battlefield. Foreground shows fallen soldiers and combat with swords and bayonets; mounted figures clash and ride through the mêlée. The middle ground is crowded with soldiers, banners, and dynamic action. A hazy, smoky background features a raised platform or monument with figures near it, lending a heroic or commemorative tone. The far background reveals a pale sky. To the right, another smaller painting hangs on the wall; the gallery has decorative molding and a roped-off central display area.

details.description: A view inside a museum gallery featuring large-scale 19th-century oil paintings in ornate gold frames. The central focus is a massive horizontal canvas depicting a chaotic historical battle scene, identified as 'The Battle of Legnano,' featuring knights on horseback in the foreground and figures blowing trumpets on a raised platform in the background. To the right, a smaller vertical painting depicts a religious scene of a body being carried, identified as 'The Transport of Christ to the Sepulcher.' A portion of another large painting is visible on the far left. The room features high, white arched ceilings with decorative molding, light grey walls, a red carpet runner on the floor, and rope stanchions separating the viewers from the artwork.

details.description: A wide-angle shot of a gallery room within the Gallery of Modern Art in Palazzo Pitti, Florence. The central focus is a monumental oil painting titled 'The Battle of Legnano' (La battaglia di Legnano) by Amos Cassioli, housed in an ornate gold frame. The painting depicts a chaotic 12th-century battle scene with the Lombard League's Carroccio (sacred war wagon) visible in the background. To the right, two smaller paintings are hung vertically: the upper one is a religious scene depicting the body of Christ, and the lower one is a small dark landscape or interior. The room features a white vaulted ceiling with coffered details and a decorative frieze. A red carpet runner and a brass rope barrier protect the main artwork. The lighting is soft and even, typical of a museum environment.
